# BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizations**: The relationship to the Beta App Clip Invocation Localizations resource you set with the request that creates a Beta App Clip Invocations resource.
- **BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BuildBundle**: The relationship to the Build Bundles resource you set with the request that creates a Beta App Clip Invocations resource.

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: The attributes you set that describe the new Beta App Clip Invocations resource.
